# Version changelog

## Release v0.16.0 (2026-01-27)

### New Features and Improvements

* Added support for unified hosts (SPOG) - endpoints that handle both workspace and account-level API calls ([#361](https://github.com/databricks/databricks-sdk-js/pull/361))
* Added unified host support for Databricks CLI authentication (`databricks-cli` auth type) ([#363](https://github.com/databricks/databricks-sdk-js/pull/363))

### Documentation

* Added example for SSE streaming support for serving endpoints (`examples/workspace/ml/query-model-streaming.ts`)


## Release v0.15.0 (2025-12-02)

### Bug Fixes

* Fixed query parameters not being sent with GET requests (e.g., `jobs.get()` was failing with "Missing required field: job_id")
* Properly configure minimum supported node.js version


## Release v0.14.2 (2025-11-14)

### Internal Changes

* Fix npm deploy


## Release v0.14.1 (2025-11-14)

### Internal Changes

* fix automatic deployment to NPM


## Release v0.13.0 (2025-11-14)

### Internal Changes

* Automatically publish the package to npm


## Release v0.12.0 (2025-11-14)

### Internal Changes

* Renamed package from `@databricks/databricks-sdk` to `@databricks/sdk-experimental` to reflect preview status


## Release v0.11.0 (2025-11-13)

### New Features and Improvements

* Added support for APIs that read or return binary data such as the file upload and download APIs
* Added 18 workspace examples covering clusters, jobs, Unity Catalog, SQL warehouses, MLflow, notebooks, and DBFS operations
* Added 14 authentication examples covering all supported methods (PAT, OAuth, Azure, GCP, AWS, config files)
* Added support for filtering Spark versions by LTS, ML runtime, GPU, Photon, Graviton, and beta status (`selectSparkVersion()`)
* Added support for filtering node types by memory, CPU, GPU, local disk, Photon, and Graviton requirements (`selectNodeType()`)
* Added streaming binary upload/download examples

### Bug Fixes

* Fixed query and path parameters being incorrectly passed as part of request body in PUT/POST requests

### Documentation

* Added comprehensive `examples/workspace/README.md` with usage guide for 18 workspace examples
* Added comprehensive `examples/auth/README.md` with authentication setup instructions and security best practices
* Added `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `DCO` (Developer Certificate of Origin) documentation
* Updated main README with links to new workspace and authentication examples
* Added JSDoc comments for all selector methods and examples

### Internal Changes

* Migrated from Yarn to npm for package management
* Updated all npm dependencies to latest versions (TypeScript 5.4.5 → 5.9.3, ESLint 8 → 9, Node types 18 → 24)

### API Changes

* Regenerated all API files from latest OpenAPI specifications


## Release v0.10.0 (2025-04-08)

### API Changes
* Update SDK to Latest OpenAPI Spec
* Update to latest OpenAPI spec and delete waiters on get methods


## Release v0.9.0 (2025-02-17)

### Bug Fixes
* Don't reject unauthorized requests if http.proxyStrictSSL is false


## Release v0.8.0 (2025-02-04)

### New Features and Improvements
* Add serverless_compute_id field to the Config


## Release v0.7.0 (2024-11-12)

### New Features and Improvements
* Correctly generate classes with nested body fields
* Add test instructions for external contributors
* Ignore DataPlane Services during generation
* Improve pipeline event listing
* Regenerate the SDK based on the new OpenAPI spec


## Release v0.6.2 (2024-03-13)

### Bug Fixes
* Bring back fetch polyfill
* Support for root certificates from system keychain in VS Code
* Support for the `skip_verify` config key in `~/.databrickscfg`
* Support for passing custom HTTP agents to the SDK

### New Features and Improvements
* Add support for subservices
* Add support for HEAD operation and response headers

### API Changes
* Update to the latest OpenAPI spec
* [Breaking] The SDK no longer automatically respects HTTP proxy environment variables. See [examples/workspace-proxy.ts](https://github.com/databricks/databricks-sdk-js/blob/main/examples/workspace-proxy.ts) as an example for how to support HTTP proxies


## Release v0.6.1 (2024-02-01)

### Bug Fixes
* Fix Databricks OAuth U2M on GCP
* Use undici instead of native fetch


## Release v0.6.0 (2024-01-30)

### New Features and Improvements
* Add support for GCP auth
* Add support for Azure MSI auth
* Improve unified auth test coverage

### API Changes
* [Breaking] Rename `Config.insecureSkipVerify` to `Config.skipVerify` and `Config.azureResourceId` to `Config.azureWorkspaceResourceId` to align config properties with attribute names in `~/.databrickscfg`


## Release v0.5.3 (2024-01-11)

### Bug Fixes
* Don't fail config resolution for account clients if DATABRICKS_METADATA_SERVICE_URL is defined

### New Features and Improvements
* Expose config loaders and skip `KnownConfigLoader` when auth is already configured


## Release v0.5.2 (2023-10-23)

### Bug Fixes
* Fix calling `abort` on garbage collected `AbortController`


## Release v0.5.1 (2023-10-17)

### Bug Fixes
* Add a custom fetch.d.ts file for custom fetch


## Release v0.5.0 (2023-10-11)

### Bug Fixes
* Adjust token expiry window to 40 seconds on Azure

### New Features and Improvements
* Add ErrorDetails to ApiError

### API Changes
* [Breaking] Require at least node.js 18.x so we can assume that `fetch` is always available


## Release v0.4.1 (2023-09-08)

### New Features and Improvements
* Handle Azure authentication when WorkspaceResourceID is provided
* Add streaming support to our version of `fetch`
* Allow configuring cluster-ID in profiles (`~/.databrickscfg`) and expose it in the config object
* Implement Azure service principal (SP) auth through the az CLI

### API Changes
* [Breaking] Move `src/services` to the VS Code extension


## Release v0.4.0 (2023-08-21)

### New Features and Improvements
* Move SDK into a separate repository under https://github.com/databricks/databricks-sdk-js


## Release v0.3.16 (2023-08-03)

### New Features and Improvements
* Bump dependency versions
* Update API to the latest version


## Release v0.3.16 (2023-07-10)

* No changes


## Release v0.3.16 (2023-06-23)

### New Features and Improvements
* Add support for Azure client secret auth
* Remove workaround for Repos API returning 429 for timeouts
* Change the License for the JS SDK to Apache 2.0
* Updated time to check for canceling listing repos from 150 to 300ms


## Release v0.3.15 (2023-06-14)

### New Features and Improvements
* Downgrade typescript to 5.0.0
* Reimplement the subset of fetch required for the SDK
* Implement OAuth M2M


## Release v0.3.14 (2023-06-02)

### New Features and Improvements
* Implement pagination
* Port error handling code from GO SDK
* Bump @types/node from 18.16.4 to 20.0.0
* Bump dependencies
* DB Connect Unified Auth Support
* Rename bricks to databricks


## Release v0.3.13 (2023-05-09)

* No changes


## Release v0.3.12 (2023-05-03)

* No changes


## Release v0.3.11 (2023-04-25)

* No changes


## Release v0.3.10 (2023-04-20)

* No changes


## Release v0.3.9 (2023-04-19)

* No changes


## Release v0.3.8 (2023-04-17)

### New Features and Improvements
* Add detection for Unity Catalogue to Clusters service
* Add metadata service client and server as credential provider
* Add credential provider to support OAuth through Databricks CLI
* Use waiter to handle long running calls


## Release v0.3.7 (2023-03-21)

### Bug Fixes
* Fix error handling for api client errors


## Release v0.3.5 (2023-03-17)

### New Features and Improvements
* Updated SDK to use latest OpenAPI spec, which adds support for SQL execution and model serving APIs
* Added support for file creation to Workspace service


## Release v0.3.4 (2023-03-10)

### New Features and Improvements
* Add support for authenticating against Azure China and Azure GovCloud using the `az` CLI


## Release v0.3.3 (2023-03-06)

### Bug Fixes
* Fix log redaction for objects with circular references


## Release v0.3.2 (2023-02-24)

* No changes


## Release v0.3.1 (2023-02-23)

### Bug Fixes
* Support `.databrickscfg` profiles that contain a dot (closes [#447](https://github.com/databricks/databricks-vscode/issues/447) reported by [@tahaum](https://github.com/tahaum))
* Remove API timeout limit for execution context runs (closes [#482](https://github.com/databricks/databricks-vscode/issues/482) reported by [@sebrahimi1988](https://github.com/sebrahimi1988))
* Show errors when parsing of host in .databrickscfg fails (closes [#479](https://github.com/databricks/databricks-vscode/issues/479))


## Release v0.3.0 (2023-02-20)

* No changes


## Release v0.2.4 (2023-02-16)

* No changes


## Release v0.2.3 (2023-02-15)

* No changes


## Release v0.2.2 (2023-02-14)

* No changes


## Release v0.2.1 (2023-02-14)

* No changes


## Release v0.2.0 (2023-02-13)

* No changes


## Release v0.0.11 (2023-01-30)

### New Features and Improvements
* Add SDK support for Files in Workspace


## Release v0.0.10 (2023-01-16)

### New Features and Improvements
* Add coverage for all public Databricks APIs
* Unify configuration for authentication methods and make them compatible with the GO SDK and all future SDKs


## Release v0.0.9 (2023-01-09)

### New Features and Improvements
* Update license to Databricks License


## Release v0.0.8 (2022-12-23)

### Bug Fixes
* Fix running the Azure CLI "az" on Windows


## Release v0.0.7 (2022-12-20)

### New Features and Improvements
* Add support for authenticating using the Azure CLI


## Release v0.0.6 (2022-12-05)

* No changes


## Release v0.0.5 (2022-11-30)

* No changes


## Release v0.0.4 (2022-11-28)

### Bug Fixes

## Release v0.0.3 (2022-11-21)

### Bug Fixes

## Release v0.0.2 (2022-11-15)
